DP.198.0000:
Hello, and welcome to
the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to rest your Pokémon?
DP.198.0001:
OK, I’ll take your Pokémon for a few
seconds.
DP.198.0002:
Thank you for waiting.\f
We’ve restored your Pokémon to full
health.\f
DP.198.0003: We hope to see you again!
DP.198.0004:
Hello, and welcome to
the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to...\f
DP.198.0005:
Th-that Trainer Card!\f
That sparkling color!
And all those stars!\f
I’ve seen several Trainers with Silver
Trainer Cards up to now...\f
But you’re the first to top them
with that Trainer Card.\f
Please, [0103,0000], may I have
the honor of healing your Pokémon?
DP.198.0006:
It’s great to see you, [0103,0000]!
You want the usual, am I right?
DP.198.0007:
I will be pleased to take your
Pokémon for a few seconds.
DP.198.0009: We hope to see you again!
DP.198.0010:
Your Pokémon may be infected with
the Pokérus.\f
Little is known about the Pokérus
except that they are microscopic\r
life-forms that attach to Pokémon.\f
While infected, Pokémon are said to
grow exceptionally well.
DP.198.0011:
[0103,0000] is out of battle-ready
Pokémon!\f
[0103,0000]’s vision dimmed!
DP.198.0013: Would you like to save the game?
DP.198.0014:
There is already a saved file.
Is it OK to overwrite it?
DP.198.0015:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.198.0017:
Warning!
There is already a saved game file.\f
If you save now, the other file’s
adventure, including items and\r
Pokémon, will be entirely lost.\f
Are you sure you want to save now
and overwrite the other save file?
DP.198.0019:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.198.0020:
There is already a saved game file.
It is impossible to save.\f
Please refer to the Instruction
Booklet for details.\f
Press Up + SELECT + B Button on
the title screen if you want to erase\r
the current saved game file.
DP.198.0021:
Saving a lot of data...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.198.0022:
Want to give a nickname to the
[0100,0000]?
DP.198.0026:
[0103,0000] installed the app on
the Pokétch.\f
DP.198.0027:
Too bad!
The Bag is full...
DP.198.0031:
[0103,0000] put away the
[011F,0001] in the Fashion Case.
DP.198.0034:
The Pokémon Storage System
was accessed.\f
DP.198.0036:
Rowan’s words echoed...
[0103,0000]! There’s a time and\r
place for everything! But not now.
DP.198.0039:
There! All happy and healthy!
Good luck and take care!
DP.198.0040:
Mom: [0103,0000]!
Welcome home.\f
It sounds like you had quite the
experience out there.\f
Maybe you should take a quick
rest so you can relax.\f
...
...
DP.198.0041:
Mom: Oh, good! You and your
Pokémon are looking great.\f
Oh, yes, I heard from Professor
Rowan.\f
He said that a Pokémon’s energy is
measured in HP (Hit Points).\f
If your Pokémon lose their HP,
you can restore it at any\r
Pokémon Center.\f
If you’re going to travel far away,
the smart Trainer stocks up on\r
Potions at the Pokémon Mart.\f
Make me proud, honey!
Take care!
DP.198.0042:
Mom: Oh, good! You and your
Pokémon are looking great.\f
Oh yes, [0103,0000], your Pokémon
will faint if it runs out of HP.\f
If your Pokémon loses its HP, come
home before it faints.\f
It will be healed to full health by
taking a rest.\f
Well, honey, make me proud!
Take care!
DP.198.0043:
First, let’s restore your Pokémon
to full health.
DP.198.0044:
Your Pokémon have been healed
to perfect health.
DP.198.0045:
Please visit a Pokémon Center when
your Pokémon’s HP goes down.\f
If you’re planning to travel any
distance, you should stock up on\r
Potions at a Pokémon Mart.\f
Good luck, Trainer!
DP.198.0046: There is a sweet scent in the air...
DP.198.0047: There is a sweet scent in the air...\f
DP.198.0048: The bark is slathered with Honey...
DP.198.0049: The bark is slathered with Honey...\f
DP.198.0051: The bark was slathered with Honey.
DP.198.0052: There’s no Mail in the Mailbox.\f
DP.198.0053:
The Mail’s content will be lost.
Take it back anyway?
DP.198.0066:
[0101,0000] survived the poisoning.
The poison faded away!\f
DP.198.0067:
It’s an air vent that exchanges
the underground tunnels’ air.
DP.198.0070: There appears to be nothing here...
DP.198.0071:
The sweet scent faded for some
reason...
DP.198.0078:
Would you like to nickname the newly
hatched [0100,0000]?
DP.198.0082:
I’m very sorry.\f
We are working underground right now.
It’s off-limits to the public.\f
Please try later on.
DP.198.0083:
The [FF00,0002]Digital Watch[FF00,0000] app displays
the current time.\f
DP.198.0084:
The [FF00,0002]Calculator[FF00,0000] app can handle
calculations up to ten digits.\f
DP.198.0085:
The [FF00,0002]Memo Pad[FF00,0000] app can be used for
jotting down quick notes.\f
DP.198.0086:
The [FF00,0002]Pedometer[FF00,0000] app counts the number
of steps you’ve walked.\f
DP.198.0087:
The [FF00,0002]Pokémon List[FF00,0000] app lets you
check on the status of your team.\f
DP.198.0088:
The [FF00,0002]Friendship Checker[FF00,0000] app identifies
the Pokémon that like you.
DP.198.0089:
The [FF00,0002]Dowsing Machine[FF00,0000] app locates
unseeable items.\f
DP.198.0090:
The [FF00,0002]Berry Searcher[FF00,0000] app indicates
the locations of ripe Berries.
DP.198.0091:
The [FF00,0002]Day-Care Checker[FF00,0000] app shows
the Pokémon left with the Day Care.
DP.198.0092:
The [FF00,0002]Pokémon History[FF00,0000] app shows
the most recently obtained Pokémon.
DP.198.0093:
The [FF00,0002]Counter[FF00,0000] app can be used
to count up to 9,999.
DP.198.0094:
The [FF00,0002]Analog Watch[FF00,0000] app displays
the current time.
DP.198.0095:
The [FF00,0002]Marking Map[FF00,0000] app allows the
placement of markers.\f
DP.198.0096:
The [FF00,0002]Link Searcher[FF00,0000] app determines
the availability of wireless hot spots.\f
DP.198.0097:
The [FF00,0002]Coin Toss[FF00,0000] app can be used
to make fair decisions.
DP.198.0098:
The [FF00,0002]Move Tester[FF00,0000] app is used to check
how moves match up.\f
DP.198.0099:
The [FF00,0002]Calendar[FF00,0000] app is a monthly
calendar with date reminders.
DP.198.0100:
The [FF00,0002]Dot Artist[FF00,0000] app gives players
free reign to their creativity.
DP.198.0101:
The [FF00,0002]Roulette[FF00,0000] app can be customized
to make an original roulette.
DP.198.0102:
The [FF00,0002]Trainer Counter[FF00,0000] app tracks
the Pokémon Radar’s rankings.\f
DP.198.0103:
The [FF00,0002]Kitchen Timer[FF00,0000] app is a 99-minute
timer.
DP.198.0104:
The [FF00,0002]Color Changer[FF00,0000] app can change
the Pokétch display color.
DP.198.0105:
The [FF00,0002]Matchup Checker[FF00,0000] app shows the
affinity of Pokémon to each other.\f
DP.198.0107:
The [FF00,0002]Alarm Clock[FF00,0000] app operates
on a 24-hour system.\f
DP.198.0109:
The [0119,0000] was sent to
the underground PC.
DP.198.0110:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“When the universe was created,
its shards became this Plate.”\f
DP.198.0111:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The power of defeated giants
infuses this Plate.”\f
DP.198.0112:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“Two beings of time and space set
free from the Original One.”\f
DP.198.0113:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“Three beings were born to bind
time and space.”\f
DP.198.0114:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“Two make matter, and three make
spirit, shaping the world.”\f
DP.198.0115:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The Original One breathed alone
before the universe came.”\f
DP.198.0116:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The powers of Plates are shared
among Pokémon.”\f
DP.198.0117:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The rightful bearer of a Plate
draws from the Plate it holds.”\f
DP.198.0118:
Ball Capsules can’t be used because
you don’t have any Seals.\f
DP.198.0119:
Saving the game again...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.198.0120:
Good morning!
Welcome to the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to rest your Pokémon?
DP.198.0121:
Hello, and welcome to
the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to rest your Pokémon?
DP.198.0122:
[0103,0000]’s Azure Flute is making
a sound!\f
Would you like to blow into the
Azure Flute?
DP.198.0125:
The Azure Flute echoed hollowly...\f
It appears to be meaningless using
the Azure Flute here...
DP.198.0127:
[0103,0000] put away the
[011F,0001] in the Fashion Case.\f
DP.198.0128:
The [0119,0000] was sent to
the underground PC.\f
